title: Product - definition
bodyHtml:
A product is a unique device.
This device has specific characteristics, attributes that depend directly on the Category 3 in which the product was created.

Each product has mandatory and optional attributes:

➡️ Mandatory attributes common to all categories:
The Back Market ID (BMID)
The EAN (European Article Number)
The title
The description
The brand
The model
The price new
The weight
The first picture 

➡️ Mandatory attributes specific to a category, such as:
Keyboard language for Laptops
Memory for a Smartphone
The power for an electric scooter

➡️ All our products also have optional attributes.
These are not mandatory, but allow you to provide more information about the products you sell, such as:
The resolution for a Laptop
The release date for a Smartphone
The autonomy for an electric scooter

As an example, for the Laptop Category, the attributes are divided as follows: 



All these attributes allow us to obtain clean, clear and complete product pages. These attributes are also here to boost the conversion rate. 

💡 If you have any questions regarding the creation of your products, you can consult the following article: Create a product on my Back Office
